description_long: This is a tall, slender porcelain vase with a bulbous lower body and a long, narrow neck, adorned with intricate hand-painted scenes and decorative motifs. The body features detailed depictions of figures in traditional Chinese attire, set against a natural landscape with trees, rocks, and flowers. The neck is embellished with ornate, swirling patterns in blue, green, and gold, and is flanked by two rectangular, pink-accented handles with floral medallions. The rim is highlighted with a pink band and delicate geometric designs, while the base is simple and unadorned. The surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and enhancing the vividness of the painted scenes. This vase exudes an air of elegance and artistry, making it a striking decorative piece.
description: A tall, slender porcelain vase with hand-painted Chinese figures, ornate patterns, and pink-accented handles, finished with a glossy surface.
description_view_0: This view highlights a painted scene of two figures in a garden, with the ornate neck and one pink-accented handle visible.
description_view_1: This angle shows a different painted scene with a single figure and more of the swirling neck pattern, as well as both handles.
description_view_2: This side features a close-up of a female figure in traditional attire, with floral and landscape details prominent.
description_view_3: This view displays the back of the vase, focusing on the landscape and rock motifs, with minimal human figures.
attribute_pattern: painted narrative scenes with floral and scrollwork motifs
